object_a.label: chair
object_a.description: bar stools / chairs along the island
object_a.long_form_open_description: A row of dark wood bar stools with carved backs and cushioned seats positioned along the near side of the island; ornate/classic styling contrasting with the modern cabinetry; three visible, tucked under the island overhang.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: lined along the near longitudinal side of the kitchen island

object_b.label: chair
object_b.description: ornate wooden bar chairs at near side of island
object_b.long_form_open_description: Pair of carved dark wood bar chairs with decorative backs and cushioned seats positioned at the near side of the island. The chairs are partially visible in foreground and show traditional ornate detailing.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Placed on the camera side of the island, closest objects to the viewer in the center third.
